definition: The maximum rate of data transfer across a network connection.
examples: Streaming video in 4K uses a lot of bandwidth.
Our office upgraded to get more bandwidth.

definition: The process of converting data into a code to prevent unauthorized access.
examples: The app uses end-to-end encryption for messages.
Encryption protects your data from hackers.

definition: To copy data from a network or the internet to your device.
examples: You can download the app for free.
It took a while to download the large file.

definition: A program used to access and view websites on the internet.
examples: Open the link in your browser.
This website works best in a modern browser.

definition: A store of temporary data that lets a device access information faster.
examples: Clear your browser cache if the page won't load.
The cache speeds up repeated requests.

definition: A security system that controls network traffic to block threats.
examples: The firewall blocked the suspicious connection.
Companies use a firewall to protect their network.

definition: A set of step-by-step rules a computer follows to solve a problem.
examples: The search algorithm ranks results by relevance.
They improved the recommendation algorithm.

definition: Remote servers used to store and access data over the internet.
examples: All my photos are backed up in the cloud.
The company moved its files to the cloud.

definition: A minor, often temporary fault or malfunction in a system.
examples: A software glitch delayed the launch.
There was a small glitch during the video call.

definition: To transfer data from your device to a network or the internet.
examples: Please upload your resume as a PDF.
She uploaded the video to her channel.

definition: The point where a user interacts with a device or program.
examples: The app has a clean, simple interface.
A good user interface makes software easy to use.

definition: Software designed to damage or gain unauthorized access to a system.
examples: Don't click that link; it may contain malware.
The malware spread across the entire network.

definition: Playing audio or video in real time over the internet without downloading it.
examples: Music streaming has changed the industry.
Live streaming lets fans watch events online.

definition: A computer that provides data or services to other computers on a network.
examples: The website went down because the server crashed.
Our files are stored on a secure server.

definition: An error or flaw in a program that causes it to behave incorrectly.
examples: The developers fixed a bug in the latest update.
There's a bug that crashes the app on startup.
